final:
// // This comment suggests that the output Y is asserted high only when all inputs are low.
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  B2  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND
);assign Y = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | C1;

endmodule
